# Upstream Compatibility

## Upstream

- Name:
- Package or endpoint:
- Transport: stdio, streamable HTTP, HTTP, or SSE
- Auth style:
- Mutating tools: yes or no

## Broker mode

- shared
- per_session
- disabled

## Smoke probe

Paste the safe read-only smoke probe you expected to pass.

## Result

Paste the error from `make profile-validation PROFILE=<profile>` or the broker facade call.
